summary: The Goshen Township Board of Zoning Appeals held its first meeting of 2025, focusing on organizational matters. The board adopted the 2025 meeting schedule with a correction to the October date, elected officers for the year, and briefly discussed upcoming accessory dwelling unit cases and potential zoning language amendments. No old or new case business was presented.
decisions: Adopted 2025 BZA meeting schedule with correction of October date to the 20th (unanimous)
Elected Mr. Siegler as BZA Chairperson for 2025 (unanimous)
Elected Mr. Jesse Shaw as BZA Vice Chairperson for 2025 (unanimous)
Elected Mr. Pruitt as BZA Secretary for 2025 (unanimous)
action_items: Harry Engel (zoning) to process any new BZA applications received before February 4th deadline
Harry Engel to follow up with contractors regarding accessory dwelling unit applications in and outside Stone Pillars
Harry Engel to bring accessory dwelling unit zoning language amendment to trustees for rewording discussion
Dennis to fix meeting document layout issues for next meeting
notable_topics: 2025 BZA meeting schedule adoption with October date correction
Election of 2025 BZA officers (Chair, Vice Chair, Secretary)
Upcoming accessory dwelling unit variance applications in Stone Pillars and elsewhere
Potential zoning language amendment for accessory dwelling units
Mr. Langenheim's possible future conflict of interest and potential departure from the board
notes: Mr. Langenheim declined the Vice Chair nomination due to a potential conflict of interest that may require him to step down from the board later in 2025. The transcript contains significant audio/caption artifacts repeating 'Board of Trustees Meeting' throughout, though this is actually a Board of Zoning Appeals (BZA) meeting. Three contractors have recently contacted staff about accessory dwelling unit applications.
title: BZA 1-27-25
